item.title: Several Ways to Convert Decimal Number to Binary in Cpp
item.description: built-in function #include<bits/stdc++.h> using namespace std; string tobinary(int n){ char s[128]; string ss; itoa(n,s,2); ss=s; return ss; } int main(){ int n; while(cin >>n){cout<<tobinary(n)<<endl;} return 0; } In this approach, I use built-in function itoa to convert integer to number of any base in string format. Also, its return type is char style string ,so be sure to convert to string to make it better to use(You can simply use = to assign char style string to std::string)
